name: poprako-web-ms-frontend
description: Poprako 桌面客户端，面向漫画汉化团队协作管理。
author: Poprako Team

scripts.build:development: pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && node scripts/build-with-production-env.mjs development
scripts.build:test: pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && node scripts/build-with-production-env.mjs test
scripts.build:staging: pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && node scripts/build-with-production-env.mjs staging
scripts.build:production: pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && node scripts/build-with-production-env.mjs production
scripts.build:production:desktop: pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && cross-env POPRAKO_RENDERER_TARGET=desktop node scripts/build-with-production-env.mjs production
scripts.electron:package:shell: pnpm electron:verify:shell && cross-env POPRAKO_ELECTRON_PACKAGE_MODE=shell electron-forge package
scripts.electron:make:win:full: cross-env POPRAKO_ELECTRON_PACKAGE_MODE=full pnpm electron:verify && cross-env POPRAKO_ELECTRON_PACKAGE_MODE=full electron-forge make --platform=win32
scripts.electron:make:win:release: cross-env POPRAKO_ELECTRON_ENABLE_DELTA=true pnpm electron:verify && cross-env POPRAKO_ELECTRON_ENABLE_DELTA=true electron-forge make --platform=win32
scripts.electron:make:win:shell: pnpm electron:verify:shell && cross-env POPRAKO_ELECTRON_PACKAGE_MODE=shell electron-forge make --platform=win32
